notes.en: Adjust pH to 7.0 with NaOH. Autoclave 121°C 15 min. Add antibiotics after cooling to <55°C. For agar plates, add 15 g/L agar before autoclaving.
notes.zh: 用 NaOH 调 pH 至 7.0。121°C 高压灭菌 15 min。冷却至 <55°C 后加抗生素。制备平板加 15 g/L 琼脂后再灭菌。

storage.notes: Autoclave at 121°C 20 min; add antibiotics at <55°C

usage.en: Lysogeny broth (LB) liquid medium for routine E. coli culture.
usage.zh: LB 培养基，用于常规大肠杆菌液体培养。

prepSteps.step: Dissolve tryptone (10 g), yeast extract (5 g), and NaCl (10 g) in ~800 mL ddH₂O.
Bring to final volume of 1000 mL.
Store at 4°C for up to 6 months.
